rawName: Propeller Overspeed — NP Exceeds Set RPM but at or below 101.5%
drillName: Propeller Overspeed — NP at or below 101.5% [Airborne]
mccGroup: No memory items — CONFIRM then QRH directly
mccReference: FCTM DHC-6 WIPLINE/G950 HBTS-001 ISS03 REV02 Section 5.6.2

flow.action: CONFIRM L/R PROPELLER IS OVERSPEEDING — acknowledge malfunction and maintain directional control.
flow.reference: MCC CALLS AND MEMORY ITEMS.pdf p.5-50; OM-B Ch 3 Sec 3.11.1.4

flow.action: CONFIRMED L/R PROPELLER OVERSPEEDING, BELOW 101.5% — check NP, T5, Torque, WF and NG to confirm
flow.reference: MCC CALLS AND MEMORY ITEMS.pdf p.5-50; OM-B Ch 3 Sec 3.11.1.4

flow.action: QRH FOR PROP OVERSPEED AT OR BELOW 101.5%
flow.reference: MCC CALLS AND MEMORY ITEMS.pdf p.5-50; OM-B Ch 3 Sec 3.11.1.4

flow.action: QRH FOR PROP OVERSPEED AT OR BELOW 101.5% COMPLETE
